# Craft: In Ardor — llms.txt
# https://github.com/PegasusSuite/craftinardor

Site: Quirky crafts, polymer clay shop, games, courses, and community.
Primary audience: hobbyists and makers shopping handmade supplies and digital resources.

## Key URLs (when deployed)
- / — main SPA (tabs include About, Platform, Community, Shop, Courses, Games, Events, Resources, FAQ, Contact; Admin when owner)
- /products.html — product catalog (if present on host)

## Contact
- Public inbox: contact@latrese.world  
- Strategic / internal docs stay in-repo only; Hosting does not serve `*.md` from this bundle.

## First-run UX (implemented on main page)
- Browse without login; checkout can use guest flow.
- Compact sticky tab bar; reduced vertical padding; mobile tabs single-row scroll.
- Hero + trust strip + 3-step path; search + shop filters; guest cart; newsletter; Firebase Analytics (`__CRAFT_DEBUG` for verbose logs).
